personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of enterprise experience, specializing in designing scalable data pipelines and optimizing data architectures like data lakes and lakehouses using AWS services such as S3, Glue, and Athena. Proficient in Python, SQL, and big data tools like Apache Spark and Hadoop, I excel in data integration, ETL processes, and ensuring data quality for high-scale systems. I have a proven track record of migrating legacy pipelines to serverless AWS architectures and automating workflows with tools like Airflow. My expertise in data warehousing and cloud platforms positions me to deliver efficient data processing solutions. I am passionate about collaborating with data scientists and analysts to support analytics initiatives. I am eager to contribute to PETADATA’s mission by building robust data platforms that drive business insights.

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock. Built a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent with Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file issues using Snappy and Parquet compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise-scale operations.

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual processes with a parallel generator-based pipeline, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Developed an interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights and 'High Trust' utilization scores. Built a modern agentic pipeline for banking-scale telemetry using PySpark and multiprocessing.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Data mining user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python and Pandas to ingest P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, enabling seasonal risk forecasting.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict bottlenecks 6 months ahead, enhancing provisioning accuracy.
Built unified reporting systems by integrating disparate data feeds into Oracle, creating executive dashboards.
Applied data mining to identify underutilized infrastructure, driving significant cost savings through hardware consolidation.
Automated data workflows and reporting using Python scripts, improving operational efficiency.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics for monitoring Brand.com and critical systems performance.
Led 'FAST' project to data-mine real-user performance metrics, providing optimization recommendations.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0, implemented TLS1.2 security, and supported AWS cloud migration.
Developed dashboards for end-to-end functionality and performance metrics analysis.
Analyzed system bottlenecks and suggested actionable performance improvements.
Integrated Performance Center with Dynatrace for comprehensive monitoring.

experience.title: APM Consultant
bullets: Supported enterprise CA APM, CEM, and ADA for utility systems monitoring.
Managed and maintained monitoring solutions to ensure system reliability and performance.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)

Resolved performance bottlenecks in J2EE/.NET environments through detailed analysis.
Optimized agent and enterprise manager installations for scalability.
Collaborated with IT teams to troubleshoot and enhance system performance.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications to identify load and break points for performance optimization.
Documented critical metrics including JDBC connections, threads, memory, CPU, and GC performance.
Installed JMX, Thread Dumps, and Wily Introscope for monitoring and analysis.
Created automation scripts to streamline performance testing processes.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster for a high-throughput shopping engine.
Optimized C++/OCCI transaction processing, reducing hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second latency.
Built a CPPUNIT testing framework to automate conversion and validation processes.

Collaborated with teams to refactor database architecture for scalability.
Documented processes and outcomes to support future migrations.
